title: ACADIA Pharma Q3 2021 Earnings Preview
text: ACADIA Pharma Q3 2021 Earnings Preview. The consensus EPS estimate was -$0.26 and the consensus revenue estimate was $127.77M, representing a 6.0% year-over-year increase. In August 2021, following Q2 earnings, ACADIA lowered its 2021 revenue guidance citing the impact of the pandemic on patient visits and lower occupancy rates at long-term care facilities. Despite the pandemic challenges, the company maintained operational focus on NUPLAZID market expansion. Q3 2021 actual results showed ACAD reported a third-quarter loss of 9 cents per share, narrower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of 27 cents. The beat demonstrated the company's ability to manage costs effectively despite revenue headwinds.
